description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a prominent display screen set into the upper front section, surrounded by a black frame with pink accents. The control panel is located below the screen and includes two visible buttons, with a coin slot area beneath. The cabinet is decorated with bold, stylized text and graphics: the left side panel displays a large pink silhouette of a cloaked figure with the words 'JEWEL RUNNER' and 'KILL YOUR MASTERS', while the right side panel features the phrases 'LIE CHEAT STEAL KILL WIN' in large pink letters. The top marquee area is adorned with pink graphics and text, contributing to a vibrant, urban aesthetic. The cabinet stands on a wide, flat black base, providing stability and a platform for placement in public or recreational spaces. The overall design is visually striking, with a strong emphasis on contrasting black and pink colors and a rebellious, street-inspired theme.
description: A tall, black arcade game cabinet with pink accents, bold side graphics, and a prominent display screen, set on a wide black base. The cabinet features stylized text and imagery, creating a vibrant, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with two buttons, coin slot area, and the pink-accented marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large pink silhouette of a cloaked figure and the phrases 'JEWEL RUNNER' and 'KILL YOUR MASTERS' in pink.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid black back panel of the cabinet with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the bold pink text 'LIE CHEAT STEAL KILL WIN' in a graffiti-like style.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with two round buttons and a joystick, all positioned centrally below the screen, with a black and pink color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features pink graphics and stylized text on a black background, matching the urban, rebellious theme of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Left side features a large pink silhouette of a cloaked figure with the phrases 'JEWEL RUNNER' and 'KILL YOUR MASTERS'; right side displays bold pink graffiti-style text 'LIE CHEAT STEAL KILL WIN'.
